title: Identity & Access Management
aim: Implement robust IAM policies to enforce least-privilege access across AWS infrastructure.
tools: AWS IAM, Active Directory, SSO, Terraform
success: Reduced unauthorized access incidents to 0; passed SOC 2 compliance audit.
desc: Designed comprehensive IAM roles and RBAC policies. Integrated third-party SSO and MFA for all administrative access. Automated access reviews using custom Python scripts and AWS CloudTrail logs.

title: Enterprise AWS Migration
aim: Migrate legacy on-premise applications to highly available, secure AWS infrastructure.
tools: AWS EC2, VPC, RDS, CloudFormation, DMS
success: Achieved 99.99% uptime, reduced infrastructure costs by 30%.
desc: Led the migration of multi-tier applications to AWS. Provisioned infrastructure using CloudFormation. Configured Auto Scaling Groups and Application Load Balancers for high availability.

title: Next.JS Portfolio Site on AWS
aim: Deploy a modern, serverless web application using CI/CD.
tools: Next.JS, AWS Amplify, Route53, GitHub Actions
success: Sub-second global load times via edge caching.
desc: Built a fully automated deployment pipeline. Changes merged to the main branch automatically trigger builds and deployments via AWS Amplify, complete with SSL management.

title: CloudPipe DevOps CI/CD
aim: Automate build and deployment pipelines for microservices.
success: Reduced deployment time from 2 hours to 5 minutes.
desc: Architected declarative Jenkins pipelines. Containerized Java/Spring Boot microservices using Docker and deployed them to EKS using Helm charts. Implemented automated security scanning in the pipeline.

title: ServerTask: Serverless API
aim: Build a highly scalable backend without provisioning servers.
tools: AWS Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Python
success: Handled 10k+ concurrent requests with zero maintenance.
desc: Developed RESTful APIs using API Gateway and Python Lambda functions. Stored state in DynamoDB, utilizing KMS for data-at-rest encryption.

title: Containerize NodeJS App
aim: Create a reproducible container environment for a Node.js application with a persistent database.
success: Standardized development environments and streamlined micro-service deployment.
desc: Wrote multi-stage Dockerfiles. Configured bind mounts for local development and persistent volumes for the MySQL database. Set up Docker networking for secure inter-container communication using Docker-Compose.
